title: salvia sclareoides var. baetica
intro: Salvia sclareoides var. baetica is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Salvia sclarea plant, commonly known as the Meadow Clary or White Sage, which is a perennial herb native to the Mediterranean region. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm the skin, reducing redness and irritation. The health benefits of Salvia sclareoides var. baetica include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce stress and anxiety, and promote a good night's sleep. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
